{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Pekler-76
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Pekler-76]] is an industrial space colony made of cold [[steel]] and painted in shades of white and gray.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c6">''The Knight'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Settlements]]
